instances.task_instruction:
You are solving a travel itinerary task. Fill the 5x2 grid with activity ids.
This travel itinerary has 5 travel days as rows and 2 activity slots per day as columns.
Each cell must use exactly one candidate id from that slot.

Across the whole grid, the plan must satisfy these global constraints:
(1) the total cost of all activities in the whole grid must be at most 1054.
(2) there must be at least 2 activities in the whole grid whose category is museum.
(3) the same location can appear at most 4 times in the whole grid.
(4) for any single row in the whole grid, the total duration must be at most 9.

For the row constraints:
For travel day 0:
(1) the total cost of all activities in travel day 0 must be at most 308.
(2) the maximum crowd level of any activity in travel day 0 must be at most 5.
(3) the same category can appear at most 1 times in travel day 0.

For travel day 1:
(1) the total cost of all activities in travel day 1 must be at most 361.
(2) the maximum crowd level of any activity in travel day 1 must be at most 4.
(3) the same category can appear at most 1 times in travel day 1.

For travel day 2:
(1) the total cost of all activities in travel day 2 must be at most 101.
(2) the maximum crowd level of any activity in travel day 2 must be at most 4.
(3) the same category can appear at most 2 times in travel day 2.

For travel day 3:
(1) the total cost of all activities in travel day 3 must be at most 220.
(2) the maximum crowd level of any activity in travel day 3 must be at most 5.
(3) the same category can appear at most 2 times in travel day 3.

For travel day 4:
(1) the total cost of all activities in travel day 4 must be at most 166.
(2) the maximum crowd level of any activity in travel day 4 must be at most 5.
(3) the same category can appear at most 1 times in travel day 4.

For the column constraints:
For activity slot 0:
(1) the total cost of all activities in activity slot 0 must be at most 381.
(2) the same category can appear at most 2 times in activity slot 0.
(3) the total rating of all activities in activity slot 0 must be at least 19.

For activity slot 1:
(1) the total cost of all activities in activity slot 1 must be at most 573.
(2) the same category can appear at most 1 times in activity slot 1.
(3) the total rating of all activities in activity slot 1 must be at least 17.

Each slot also has its own local constraints, but those slot-specific limits must be looked up from the dataset/database for that slot before deciding which candidate id to use.
Return only a 5x2 list of activity ids.
